summary: Iteration 64: Achievements System & Analytics Dashboard - All tests passed. Fixed backend startup issue where push_scheduler_loop was defined after being called.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified all new features: Achievements system with 15 badges (3 earned for test user: streak_3, sage_student, community_light), Analytics page with 3 tabs (Overview, Achievements, Activity), background push scheduler running on startup. Fixed: push_scheduler_loop function was defined after startup_tasks that called it - moved function definition before the event handler.

backend_api.GET /api/achievements/analytics: ✓ Returns coherence_history, daily_activity (14 days), feature_usage (6 features), streak, totals

frontend_ui.overview_tab: ✓ Shows Feature Usage bar chart and Coherence History section
frontend_ui.achievements_tab: ✓ Shows grid of 15 badges with earned/locked states (3/15 unlocked)
frontend_ui.activity_tab: ✓ Shows 14-day daily activity chart and streak stats
frontend_ui.profile_dropdown: ✓ Analytics link appears in profile dropdown menu
frontend_ui.search_command: ✓ Analytics searchable via Cmd+K search command
frontend_ui.coherence_widget: ✓ Quantum Coherence widget on Dashboard links to /analytics when clicked

background_scheduler.push_scheduler_loop: ✓ Registered on startup (confirmed in backend logs)

bug_fixed.issue: Backend startup failed with NameError: name 'push_scheduler_loop' is not defined
bug_fixed.cause: push_scheduler_loop function was defined after startup_tasks event handler that called it
bug_fixed.fix: Moved push_scheduler_loop function definition before the @app.on_event('startup') handler
